The Model

Share the Cost. Share the Deed. Share the Wealth.

Ride-sharing changed how we move. Co-working changed where we work. NEXUS brings that same principle to the most powerful wealth-building asset in America — the home.

🤝

Share the Cost

Down payment, mortgage, taxes, maintenance — every fixed cost split equitably among co-owners. The number that felt impossible alone becomes achievable together.

📜

Share the Deed

Your name on the title. A legal co-ownership structure, drafted properly, so everyone's stake is protected from day one.

📈

Share the Wealth

Equity grows from the moment you close — and it grows for you, not a landlord. Co-ownership is the smartest path to equity most Californians were never offered.

Create your free account

NEXUS Connect is free, forever. No card required to start.
